M1730_PHQ2_DPRSN M1730 PHQ2- Feeling Down, Depressed, Or Hopeless This field indicates how often the patient has been bothered by feeling down, depressed, or hopeless. 00 = Not at all/0 - 1day
01 = Several days/2 - 6 days
